title: Full-stack Next.js App with Supabase
description: Complete route for building a Next.js app using Supabase as the all-in-one backend: PostgreSQL database with RLS, built-in auth (no separate auth service needed), and object storage — from project init to production deployment.

steps.description: Initialize a new Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up styling with Tailwind CSS v4
Wire up Supabase: @supabase/ssr clients for server/browser/middleware, cookie-based auth sessions, Row Level Security policies, and TypeScript type generation
Add Zod schema validation for forms and API inputs before hitting Supabase
Add error monitoring for server components, route handlers, and client-side errors
Configure CI pipeline: TypeScript check, lint, and build on every push
Deploy to Vercel with NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY configured
